name: hospital-his
description: Hospital Information System for small clinics in Mongolia

scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm --workspace apps/api run build && npm --workspace apps/web run build
scripts.lint: npm --workspace apps/api run lint && npm --workspace apps/web run lint
scripts.seed: npm run build:shared && npm --workspace apps/api run seed
scripts.seed:lab: npm run build:shared && npm --workspace apps/api run seed:lab
